About: It is about a type of economic system involving social ownership of the means of production within the framework of a market economy.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the socialist calculation debate.
It is associated with the Ricardian socialist economists.
It is associated with mutualist philosophers.
It is associated with the classical liberal philosopher John Stuart Mill.
It is associated with the anarchist philosopher Pierre-Joseph Proudhon.
It is associated with Josiah Warren.
It is associated with Stephen Pearl Andrews.
It is associated with William B. Greene.
It is associated with Benjamin Tucker.
It is associated with neoclassical economic theory.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a mix that includes public or private enterprises.
HasA: It has the use of supply and demand signals to guide the allocation of capital goods and the means of production.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by complete and self-regulating systems.
It is characterized by changing patterns of enterprise ownership and management.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by classical economics.
It was influenced by neoclassical economic theory.
IsA: It is a type of economic system.
It is a form of market simulated planning.
It is a member of the Ricardian socialists.
It is a member of the classical liberal philosopher John Stuart Mill.
It is a member of the anarchist philosopher Pierre-Joseph Proudhon.
It is a member of Josiah Warren.
It is a member of Stephen Pearl Andrews.
It is a member of William B. Greene.
It is a member of Benjamin Tucker.
It is a member of neoclassical economic theory.
KnownAs: It is known as free-market socialism.
It is known as anarchistic socialism.
It is known as individual anarchism.
KnownFor: It is known for retaining the use of supply and demand signals.
It is known for aiming to achieve greater economic stability and equality through changing patterns of enterprise ownership and management.
It is known for proposing the creation of co-operative enterprises to compete in a free-market economy.
It is known for allowing individuals to receive the full product of their labor.
It is known for removing the market-distorting effects of concentrating ownership and wealth in the hands of a small class of private property owners.
It is known for its utilization of financial prices and calculation.
It is known for operating within free markets under the criterion of profitability.
MemberOf: It is a member of the Ricardian socialists.
It is a member of the classical liberal philosopher John Stuart Mill.
It is a member of the anarchist philosopher Pierre-Joseph Proudhon.
It is a member of Josiah Warren.
It is a member of Stephen Pearl Andrews.
It is a member of William B. Greene.
It is a member of Benjamin Tucker.
It is a member of neoclassical economic theory.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Eastern Bloc.
It occurred in the United States.
UsedFor: It is used for achieving greater economic stability and equality.
UsedIn: It is used in the framework of a market economy.
It is used in the Eastern Bloc.
It is used in the United States.
UsedTo: It is used to guide the allocation of capital goods and the means of production.
It is used to eliminate exploitation.
It is used to allow individuals to receive the full product of their labor.
It is used to remove the market-distorting effects of concentrating ownership and wealth.
It is used to achieve Pareto efficiency.
It is used to achieve greater economic stability and equality.
